fields.name: Analysis Area
fields.tooltip:
Contains the application area of the analysis template. The following options are available:
Sales: The analysis report was set up in Sales & Receivables
Purchase: The analysis report was set up in Purchases & Payables
Inventory: The analysis report was set up in Inventory

fields.name: Analysis Line Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the analysis line template name for this analysis report.

fields.name: Analysis Column Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the column template name for this analysis report.
